changeSet.author: s04spike
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS nexus_spike

changeSet.author: s04spike
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS nexus_spike.embeddings ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL, key TEXT NOT NULL, payload TEXT NOT NULL )

changeSet.author: s04spike
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE nexus_spike.embeddings ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY
ALTER TABLE nexus_spike.embeddings FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY

changeSet.author: s04spike
changeSet.sql: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON nexus_spike.embeddings USING (tenant_id = current_setting('nexus.tenant', true)) WITH CHECK (tenant_id = current_setting('nexus.tenant', true))

changeSet.author: s04spike
changeSet.sql: GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA nexus_spike TO s04user
GRANT SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE ON nexus_spike.embeddings TO s04user
GRANT USAGE, SELECT ON SEQUENCE nexus_spike.embeddings_id_seq TO s04user
